_comment: Hooks for java-plugin. PostToolUse: optionally format changed Java files via google-java-format or Spotless when present. Skips silently when neither is configured.

hooks.command: f="$CLAUDE_FILE"; case "$f" in *.java) [ -f pom.xml ] && grep -q 'spotless' pom.xml 2>/dev/null && ./mvnw -q spotless:apply -Dspotless.check.skip=true 2>/dev/null; [ -f build.gradle.kts ] && grep -q 'spotless' build.gradle.kts 2>/dev/null && ./gradlew -q spotlessApply 2>/dev/null; exit 0;; esac
